_comment: Copy to .dev-settings.json and customize. This file is committed; .dev-settings.json is gitignored.
_docs: Any field here is deep-merged into the Engram plugin's data.json when setup-dev.sh runs.
Top-level fields overwrite the plugin's defaults directly.
The 'providers' object is merged at the provider level — you only need to include
the providers you want to override, and only the fields you want to change.
API keys should NOT go here — store them in Obsidian's SecretStorage via the plugin settings UI.
